label: Task
description: Activity object capturing tasks related to Leads, Contacts, Accounts, Opportunities, and Campaigns. Activity records are captured and synced via Einstein Activity Capture with Microsoft Outlook integration.
migrationNotes: 150,000 activity records (Tasks and Events combined) confirmed for migration. Historical task visibility must be validated post-migration.

relationships.description: Task linked to Lead via WhoId
Task linked to Contact via WhoId
Task linked to Account via WhatId
Task linked to Opportunity via WhatId
Task linked to Campaign via WhatId

einsteinActivityCapture.notes: Tasks synced from Microsoft Outlook via Einstein Activity Capture. AppExchange setup required. Client-side app or license setup guidance to be provided.

source: Meridian Leasing - Salesforce Sales Cloud Migration Design Document (Magna Technology Group, May 2026)
